title: ConceptScheme
description: A controlled vocabulary or other list of approved terms for a concept

version.description: A version number or other version designation of the concept scheme

created.description: The date on which the Concept Scheme was first created

examples: A classification scheme for scientific research domains.
A controlled vocabulary for classifying federal government data assets by sensitivity and access requirements.

title.title: title
title.description: The title of the concept scheme

_oldDocs.rationale: The introduction of skos:ConceptScheme in DCAT-US 3.0 enhances data resource organization, categorization, and accessibility. It provides a structured framework for controlled vocabularies, aligning with FAIR Vocabulary principles for improved data interoperability and discoverability.

examples.title: Science Domains
examples.description: A classification scheme for scientific research domains.
